mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'UNPAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_payment, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as paid, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SHIPPED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delivered, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FINISHED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status <> 'DELETED'
